title: NO SPOILERS Maris Age
wikitext:
[]: [NO SPOILERS] Mari's Age?             Quote Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Tue Jan 01, 2013 12:54 am I'm sorry to waste your time but could anyone tell me Makinami-san's Age?

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Jan 01, 2013 3:03 am ....the best answer to your question based on general appearance alone would probably be "around the same age as Asuka/Shinji etc. give or take a year"

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 01, 2013 4:07 am She is clearly a growing lass, as her comments in Ha about the fit of her plug-suit make clear; so, barring any funny business about her, that would be early teens. As we can't even be sure about the other girls in the new continuity (is this Rei a clone only a few years old?), that has to be our best guess.

[]:             Quote Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Tue Jan 01, 2013 12:05 pm I was hearing that if you add the seiyuu's birthdate that would be her birthday but I want to know her birth year My guess is 15

[]:             Quote Post by EvaBrothers » Tue Jan 01, 2013 12:20 pm I have looked around for information but I found nothing so far. However, she looks like 16 to me.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jan 01, 2013 2:55 pm There's a discussion of Mari, including her age, in the Q subforum here ; don't go to it if you're avoiding spoilers, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jan 01, 2013 3:54 pm One would have to look through all the info articles released in magazines and the like. My guess would be that she's Kaworu's age. Anno DID tell sadamoto to make her more "adult like"/ slightly more developed than the other girls (he also explicitly demanded the boobs, the hairstyle was Sadamoto's own idea) so she may indeed be a tidbit older. But it is fully possible to posses such... characteristics at 14/15. I had them at that age, now, if only the rest of me was as good-looking as the rest of Mari...Same goes for secondary characteristics on males, actually, my brother had a lot of stubble at 14. Cue joke involving genderbending and a certain moustachetastic nintendo character. "It's-a-me, Mario!"

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Tue Jan 01, 2013 5:21 pm I'd say 14, but knowing how animu can make people look older or younger, she could be anywhere from 12 to 16.

[]:             Quote Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Tue Jan 01, 2013 8:24 pm Kendrix wrote: One would have to look through all the info articles released in magazines and the like. My guess would be that she's Kaworu's age. Anno DID tell sadamoto to make her more "adult like"/ slightly more developed than the other girls (he also explicitly demanded the boobs, the hairstyle was Sadamoto's own idea) so she may indeed be a tidbit older. But it is fully possible to posses such... characteristics at 14/15. I had them at that age, now, if only the rest of me was as good-looking as the rest of Mari...Same goes for secondary characteristics on males, actually, my brother had a lot of stubble at 14. Cue joke involving genderbending and a certain moustachetastic nintendo character. "It's-a-me, Mario!"

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Fri Jan 04, 2013 9:55 am If I recall correctly, the size of Rei and Asukas "Assets" changed frequently in the original series for whatever reason. So unless Mari's proportions are the same throughout the rebuild, it's possible that the boobs are just some minor fan-service regardless of her age.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaBrothers » Fri Jan 04, 2013 11:57 am I assumed Mari's 15-16 because of her height (she's taller than the Children, although not as tall as Misato), her face and body shape (and 'assets') look more mature (albeit I understand there are animation inconsistencies here and there) and she seems to have been around for longer than the other kids.

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Fri Jan 04, 2013 3:31 pm Mari looks to be slightly older than the other pilots, about 15-16. I always pictured her being the same age as Kaworu since he had a slightly older look than the other children as well.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Fri Jan 04, 2013 4:20 pm She's underage, that's all we need to know.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jan 04, 2013 4:22 pm It is worth mentioning that the CR apparently indentifies her as the fourth child. Implying she was recruited sometime during 1.0

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 04, 2013 4:48 pm Kendrix wrote: It is worth mentioning that the CR apparently indentifies her as the fourth child.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Fri Jan 04, 2013 7:31 pm EvaBrothers wrote: I assumed Mari's 15-16 because of her height (she's taller than the Children, although not as tall as Misato), her face and body shape (and 'assets') look more mature (albeit I understand there are animation inconsistencies here and there) and she seems to have been around for longer than the other kids.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 04, 2013 8:10 pm I also assumed based on looks/personality, Mari was the same age as NGE Kaworu (15), since we have no idea what's anybody's exact age in NME. (Unless I'm forgetting what the 1.11 and 2.22 booklets say.) At least Shinji, Asuka, and Rei are still in 8th grade (13/14) in both NGE and NME. Tried searching on EGF through some 2.0 CRC interviews (e.g: Mari having been the Fourth Children in one of the drafts) but I haven't found anything yet. It is a lot to go through.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jan 05, 2013 1:08 pm Mari is indeed a minor, but to be exact she is 15 years old. Thank you, 2.22 booklet! Besides, boob size has nothing to do with age. Anyone remember Yoko from Gurren Lagann? She was sixteen years old and in possession of breasts the size of Siamese watermelons. At the same time, there are child characters with head -sized breasts and adults with no chest at all. Boob size does not equal an age indicator.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 05, 2013 8:47 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Anyone remember Yoko from Gurren Lagann? She was sixteen years old and in possession of breasts the size of Siamese watermelons.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jan 05, 2013 10:39 pm So, Yoko's younger than I am. I say again, WHY . Anyway, my finger slipped; Mari's actually 14, not 15. My bad there, I should have corrected it earlier. The packet claims that she's a Brit, and that she pilots unit 05; the age I picked up by doing some scrounging based on data from the packet. It's not explicitly there. I have a bad habit with that kind of thing; it's gotten me into trouble in the past. I'm trying to correct it. On a completely off topic note, I believe that Siamese Watermelon would be an awesome custom title.
summary:
[]: [NO SPOILERS] Mari's Age?             Quote Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Tue Jan 01, 2013 12:54 am I'm sorry to waste your time but could anyone tell me Makinami-san's Age?

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Jan 01, 2013 3:03 am ....the best answer to your question based on general appearance alone would probably be "around the same age as Asuka/Shinji etc.
